creator: keramida@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

The message listed in the PR appears in the file 
src/sys/dev/usb/uhci.c which has seen a lot of changes since September 
2001 (when this was submitted). 

Does this problem still trouble you with one of the newer FreeBSD 
releases (4.5-RELEASE, 4.6-RELEASE, 4.6.2-RELEASE or 4-STABLE)?
